'''Atomic compression bombs''' were powerful [[Nuclear weapon/Legends|nuclear weapons]] used by the [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] at the time of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Towed into position by [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]],<ref name="EGTD" /> they were used against [[Starship/Legends|ships]] and [[Space station/Legends|space stations]], and were considered to be better than any weapon used by the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]].<ref name="SW1">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]]</ref>

{{Weapon-stub}}
